creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Am I correct assuming that this is a port that applies a patchset to the standard port? I would prefer that it inherited the standard postgresql port then, rather than making a copy of everything. Maintenance will not work otherwise.

The patches for the service could be enclosed as a patch for in the main port, or perhaps as a slave port?

The contrib part could perhaps even be extracted to a separate port, or a slave port here as well?

Palle
